title: Kraenzlinella muricata

The species is further categorized as a type of terrestrial orchid. Within the family Orchidaceae, Kraenzlinella muricata is part of the subfamily Vanilloideae. Its classification is part of ongoing research in the field of orchid taxonomy.

intro: Kraenzlinella muricata, also known as the "Rough-horned Kraenzlinella", is a species of orchid that is native to tropical regions. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation, as well as preventing infections. The bioactive constituents of Kraenzlinella muricata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made with Kraenzlinella muricata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
